title: Gyara's plants
description: A mod that adds various new houseplants to minecraft!
body:
This mod adds various **houseplants** to minecraft.

**No dependecy required!**

_This mod was made in MCreator_

### **CURRENT ADDITIONS:**
- Craftable colorful big flowerpots (No function besides just decoration yet),

- 3 different types of monstera,
 
- A wild monstera variation,
 
- Beucarnea recurvata palm,
 
- 7 variations of saintpaulias,
 
- 2 variations of sansevieria,
 
- 8 variations of the coleus plant (4 tall and 4 short but dense),
 
- 3 syngonium variants.


All plants, besides the wild monstera, can be put in vanilla flower pots.

More plants are planned! (I'm open for suggestions!)

**Currently planned(+added) plants list**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[https://trello.com/b/Sjv4NLf5/gyaras-plants-mod](https://trello.com/b/Sjv4NLf5/gyaras-plants-mod)

</details>

### ADDED CONTENT 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All the pots
![All the pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f839c189696425aec7e080c5e2ec680843d9099d.png)

All the plants

![All the plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3a87b5896148f1adf30df58a4cee97fa28e8300.png)
![Said plants in pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f39d34d9348279bc763085c5043d26779f9be672.png)

</details>

### WAYS OF OBTAINING THE PLANTS:

**Monstera Variants**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A two blocks tall monstera variant can be found in the **jungle biomes**.
![Wild monstera found in a jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ba31deb4fafb7ae4501c0d120daf3c8ff3bb81.png)

To obtain the pottable variants, you simple destroy the plant, having the following chances;
- **Highest** chance for the **Monstera deliciosa**, which is the classic green variant.
- A **lower** chance for the **Monstera variegata** variant, which has white spots.
- **Lowest** chance for the **Monstera albo** variant, which is mostly white.

</details>

**Beucarnea Recurvata**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This plant can be found fairly commonly in the **savanna biomes**.
![Beucarnea found in a savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40014d220b612d01d32a3895d9c673754f5943ff.png)
I plan on adding a tree variant to spawn in savannas instead.
If you currently wish to look at the wood/leaves, simply add them by command. (gyaras_plants:beucarnea_leaves or beucarnea_wood)

</details>

**Saintpaulia**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All Saintpaulia variants randomly spawn in **jungle biomes**.
![Purple Saintpaulia found in a jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e170bdabcbb3b2721e63fa26f86de4f397ef0a5.png)

</details>

**Sansevieria**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The two sansevieria variants can be found commonly spawning in the desert biome.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d0e8b789a519b9ccf9ed4bfd5c82d1cc724b82.png)

</details>

**Coleus**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A dense variant of the coleus plant can be found spawning rarely in every overworld biome.
![Red dense Coleus found in the plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b4e16d1ea8e0c81ea451ad38ef6860af2b76739.png)

The tall variant can be obtained by **shearing** the dense one or by putting the two items in crafting _**>THE CRAFTING CURRENTLY DESTROYS THE SHEARS!!.**_
Vice versa, if you only have the tall variant, you can use **bonemeal** and it will grow into the dense variant.

</details>

**Syngonium**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The **light** and **dark** variants can be found spawning in every **forest** biome.
![Light Syngonium found in a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ada0dd635060d09c9ca7f6f1e6eb738eae6f3ca.png)
**HOWEVER**, the **pink** variant only spawns in the **cherry grove** biome.
![Pink Syngonium found in a cherry groove biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8280bb2cc4e95bf4151be785bce96d4609f8ae03.png)

</details>

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
If there are any bugs, please do let me know on the Trello page or Curseforge comments!
